name: Qonhub AI 12 SaaS Gradient
description: A crisp SaaS-editorial variant with cool blue accents, clean cards, and product-document clarity. Preserves Qonhub AI frontend data contracts and derives from the NetEase News Inspired base theme.
notes: Generated as a high-level visual variant inspired by Stripe. It does not copy logos, assets, content, or proprietary source code.
Keeps Qonhub AI Blade variables, SEO meta fields, JSON-LD schema output, category navigation, article routes, and markdown HTML rendering intact.
Visual differences are concentrated in theme.css and documented in tokens.json for future maintenance.
